title: 6 Logging in to PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct
body_text:
6	Logging in to PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct
6.1	Overview of Logging in to PaymentStream Direct
To access
PaymentStream
Direct:
The individual must be a Client Centre User or a CPS Admin Security Officer.
The individual must be assigned access to the appropriate
PaymentStream
Direct applications, which are managed through CPS Admin or the User Management application.
6.2	Logging in to PaymentStream Direct
To log in to
PaymentStream
Direct:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
PaymentStream Direct
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 3: Accessing PaymentStream Direct
View the
PaymentStream
Direct home page. See Figure 4.
Note:	The functions available to the user are based on the userâs permissions. See Chapter 5, Managing
PaymentStream
Direct Users, for more information on user permissions.
Note:	If your financial institution has multiple brands, the user is prompted to select a brand before the home page appears.
Figure 4: Home Page
Caution
:	Always log off when stepping away from your desk or when finished using
PaymentStream
Direct.
END
